Personal quarters: single bunk draped in soft blankets, jade plant on shelf, wide porthole framing violet nebula swirls outside.
Space-station cafe: curved wooden booths, steaming mugs of chai, floor-to-ceiling window revealing slow-turning starfield beyond.
Captain's study: oak desk with flickering holo-star-map, worn leather chair, brass lamp casting warm pool of amber light.
Greenhouse module: rows of tomato vines and ferns beneath glass dome, Earth's blue curve visible through transparent ceiling panels.
Sleep-pod pre-jump: padded cocoon with knitted throw, porthole showing distant Mars, string of fairy lights overhead.
Observation lounge: deep cushioned chairs, steaming teacups, panoramic window framing Jupiter's swirling storms in golden light.
Tea nook: small corner with copper kettle humming, shelf of dog-eared paperbacks, fern in terracotta pot.
Lab observatory: brass telescope angled toward Orion, threadbare rug, rocking chair creaking gently, star charts on walls.
Crew bunk: hammock strung with quilts, personal porthole revealing Milky Way band, succulent collection in recycled containers.
Ship galley: compact kitchen with hanging herbs, warm Edison bulbs, worn wooden cutting board, window showing passing asteroids.
Reading nook: curved pod-chair upholstered in corduroy, actual potted fern from Earth, soft amber reading light overhead.
Quiet cafeteria: orange-glow pendant lamps, two crew members lingering over soup, wide viewport showing distant Saturn's rings.
Orbital hot-tub: steaming cedar-lined tub, towels on wooden rack, floor-to-ceiling window revealing cloud-wrapped planet below.
Private library pod: floating bookshelves anchored to walls, ceramic teapot on low table, portholes showing binary star system.
Space-cabin hearth: crackling plasma-fire in iron stove, knitted rug, rocking chair, impossible warmth against infinite cold outside.
Crew lounge: deep pit-seating with quilted cushions, projected film of Earth forests, bowls of popcorn, drowsy laughter.
Sunroom pod: angled glass catching Sol's rays, hanging ferns, wooden bench warmed by unfiltered sunlight streaming through.
Shared dining table: mismatched wooden chairs, ceramic bowls steaming, warm pendant lights, laughter echoing, stars wheeling beyond window.
Bonsai corner: centuries-old miniature pine on lacquered stand, meditation cushion, small fountain trickling, nebula glowing through skylight.
Ship bakery: flour-dusted counter, rising dough under cloth, yeasty warmth filling air, viewport showing comet's tail streaming past.
Knitting circle: cushioned chairs tethered in low-gravity, yarn baskets floating gently, wide window framing distant spiral galaxy beyond.
Mail nook: wooden pigeonholes holding physical letters, worn armchair, brass lamp, photographs from Earth pinned to cork board.
Painting studio: easel facing viewport, half-finished nebula canvas, paint-stained smock hanging, natural horsehair brushes in ceramic jar.
Tea ceremony chamber: tatami mats, low wooden table, clay teapot steaming, shoji screen backlit by Saturn's glow outside.
Chess alcove: two wing-back chairs in burgundy leather, inlaid board between, carafe of brandy, porthole revealing Andromeda.
Fireplace lounge: plasma hearth flickering orange, sheepskin rug, overstuffed sofa with throws, viewport showing ice-ring debris field.
Gaming corner: vintage arcade cabinet glowing, beanbag chairs, string lights, small fridge humming, station lights twinkling beyond glass.
Listening room: wood-paneled walls, turntable spinning vinyl, velvet armchair, tube-amp warmth, viewport framing distant Earth crescent.
Dog quarters: terrier curled on plaid bed, chew toys scattered, food bowls anchored down, porthole showing Moon's cratered surface.
Holographic garden: stepping into projected cherry blossoms, wooden bench feels solid, recorded birdsong, stars visible through illusion-branches.
Meditation alcove: woven floor cushion, incense smoke curling in recycled air, singing bowl on silk cloth, viewport revealing distant supernova remnant.
Navigator's cabin: star charts pinned to cork walls, mug of cocoa cooling, wool socks drying, cracked porthole showing asteroid belt.
Hydroponics rest-bench: wooden seat between strawberry rows, soil-smell, warm grow-lights, transparent dome overhead showing comet passage.
Engineer's corner: hammock strung near humming reactor, thermos of coffee, grease-stained manual, small window showing engine's blue glow.
Journalist's desk: typewriter clacking softly, pressed flowers in journal, anglepoise lamp, round window framing Jupiter's red spot rotating.
Quilting station: fabric scraps in wicker basket, sewing machine bolted down, thimble collection, porthole showing Titan's orange haze.
Breakfast booth: two-person nook with gingham cushions, jam jars, toast crumbs, sunrise through station window illuminating coffee steam.
Aromatherapy pod: lavender bundles hanging, diffuser misting, reclining chair, skylight showing slow nebula drift in magenta and teal.
Harmonica player's perch: stool by maintenance shaft, worn instrument, setlist on napkin, grimy porthole revealing distant colony lights.
Cartographer's table: rolled parchment maps, magnifying glass, candle in glass holder, oval window showing uncharted stellar nursery glowing.
Pilot's rest-cabin: fleece-lined hammock swaying gently, mug of honey tea cooling, battered paperback, porthole revealing twin moons rising.
Botanist's workbench: seedlings in terra-cotta trays, soil under fingernails, handwritten labels, dome ceiling showing Cassiopeia constellation overhead.
Evening alcove: two crewmates sharing wine, soft laughter, woolen blankets draped, panoramic view of aurora rippling across planet below.
Musician's corner: acoustic guitar leaning against wall, sheet music scattered, warm amber lamp, small window framing distant pulsar glow.
Therapy room: overstuffed couch with knit pillows, tissue box, fern breathing quietly, circular window revealing peaceful star cluster.
Bread-baking nook: sourdough starter bubbling, flour handprints on apron, oven warmth radiating, porthole showing comet tail streaking silver.
Poet's writing desk: fountain pen and ink bottle, crumpled drafts, candle flame steady, round window revealing slow-spinning ringworld.
Sauna pod: cedar-planked walls steaming, ladle and bucket, towel hooks, frosted porthole barely showing ice moon beyond condensation.
Children's playroom: stuffed animals tethered, crayon drawings taped up, story-time rug, large window showing colorful planetary rings rotating.
Elder's quarters: rocking chair with patchwork quilt, family photos in frames, herbal tea steeping, porthole revealing homeworld's blue dot.
